prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASR-7INCH-SURVIVAL-KNIFE-FBA Product Type: SURVIVAL_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Full Tang Tanto Survival Knife with Fire Starter, 7 inch, Serrated Spine, Black and Green Camping Hunting Gear Description: The ASR Outdoor Full Tang Hunting Knife is a great addition to any camping or outdoor tools collection. Each knife is constructed of 440 stainless steel with a tanto point as well as serrated spine.

Additionally, these 7" knives include a magnesium rod fire starter, so you'll have fire in seconds if you need it. The paracord wrapped handle allow for a comfortable and easy grip in any situation.

Each knife includes a nylon sheath with a belt loop, and will come in handy in an emergency or survival situation. Search Terms: best hunting knife paracord wrap survival knvies outdoor emergency wilderness gift fixed blade tactical tanto point camping accessories gear Features: - FULL TANG SURVIVAL KNIFE: Heavy duty 440 stainless steel construction; 3mm thick serrated spine with tanto point blade - MILITARY GREEN PARACORD WRAPPED HANDLE: Ideal gift for any prepper or man who likes to always be prepared. Use the paracord wrap to attach to a stick for a spear or lash together to make shelter - INCLUDES NYLON BELT LOOP SHEATH: Easy to carry and great for any hiking excursion; whittle some wood around the camp fire or prepare your game for dinner - EMERGENCY SURVIVAL KNIFE: Use the the included magnesium rod against the spine of the knife to create sparks; rule number one is to always get a fire started in order to survive in the wilderness - COMPACT AND LIGHTWEIGHT: Versatile, rugged and convenient this 7 inch fixed blade survival knife will keep you going when you need it most === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 7 inch Black Green Survival Knife
